raw.message: Ein Sturm braut sich zusammen. Tägliche Phase-1-Turniere inkl. Preisgeldränge bis 10. Mai.

hook.summary: Announcement of a legendary €9 poker tournament with a €425,000 guarantee for its 15th anniversary.
hook.visual_action: A dark background with lightning and poker chips transitions to reveal the Sunday Storm 15th Anniversary logo.

scene_flow: Initial screen displays the €425,000 guarantee and the €9 buy-in price point.
The Sunday Storm 15th Anniversary logo appears in the center of the frame.
Text changes to highlight more flights and earlier payouts for players.
Final screen announces that daily Phase 1 tournaments are running immediately.
on_screen_text: Ab 18 Jahre. Lizenziert in Deutschland. Glücksspiel kann süchtig machen. Infos und Hilfe unter buwei.de
audience_proxy: German-speaking poker players interested in low-buy-in tournaments with high guaranteed prize pools.
